stories.desc_zh: 今日热点导览 花呗就还款页面无法正常打开致歉 中芯国际市值超越贵州茅台 iPhone 18 Pro Max成本大涨，起步价或维持在9999元 英伟达将与Hugging Face合作开发机器人开源模型 美国多州可能于下周起诉阻止派拉蒙与华纳兄弟交易 TOP 3大新闻 老乡鸡五年五次冲击上市失败 LXJ International Holdings Limited（简称“老乡鸡”）于2026年1月8日递交港交所的招股书于7月8日失效。这家被称为“中式快餐第一”的企业，五年间已第五次冲击资本市场失败。（界面新闻） 两款燃油车重回销量榜前十 在短暂告别销量榜前十后，燃油车又杀回来了。在新能源车渗透率连续三个月维持在60%以上的市场趋势下，两款燃油车——丰田凯美瑞与大众朗逸——于2026年6月重回乘用车零售销量前十，打破了5月销量榜没有燃油车的局面。 懂车帝发布的5月乘用车零售销量排行榜显示，丰田凯
stories.desc_en: Today's hot tour Huawei apologized for not opening the repayment page properly SMIC's market value surpassed that of Guizhou Maotai's iPhone 18 Pro Max. The cost soared. The starting price or maintenance at 9,999 yuan. Nvidia will cooperate with Hugging Face to develop an open-source model of the robot. stories.title_zh: 9点1氪丨“国产存储第一股”长鑫科技公布承销团阵容；SK海力士登陆美股，上市首日大涨近13%；OpenAI推出ChatGPT智能体
stories.title_en: 9点1氪丨“国产存储第一股”长鑫科技公布承销团阵容；SK海力士登陆美股，上市首日大涨近13%；OpenAI推出ChatGPT智能体
stories.desc_zh: 今日热点导览 “全球首款智能体手机”已备货8万至10万台？知情人士：假的 百亿私募数量达142家，再次刷新历史纪录 三星李在镕拟于7月底赴美会晤英伟达黄仁勋 德国大众拟大裁员，最高或裁减12万个岗位 OpenAI高管层再现变动，首席运营官因病离职 TOP3大新闻 长鑫科技，承销团阵容公布  长鑫科技IPO进入发行倒计时，这家“国产存储第一股”背后的承销团阵容也随之浮出水面。最新披露的招股意向书显示，长鑫科技预计7月16日发行。本次IPO中，中金公司、中信建投担任联席保荐机构及主承销商，国泰海通、国元证券、华泰联合、招商证券担任联席主承销商，合计6家券商组成承销团。 这是一支少见的“豪华承销团”。一边是中金、中信建投、国泰海通、华泰联合、招商证券等头部投行密集出现，另一边是安徽本土券商国元证券进入主承销名单。更有意思的是，多家主承销商同时也是长鑫科技股东，投行收入之外，股权投资收益
stories.desc_en: Today's hot tour "The world's first smartphone" has 80,000 to 100,000 units in stock? People familiar with the matter: The number of fake tens of billions of private placements reached 142, once again breaking the historical record. Samsung Li Zaiyong plans to meet Nvidia Huang Jenxun in the United States at the end of July to meet with Volkswagen's proposed mass layoffs, the maximum or cuts of 120,000 positions OpenAI executives to reproduce the changes. The chief operating officer left the top 3 news Changxin Technology due to illness. The underwriting group lineup announced that Changxin Technology IPO entered the countdown of issuance, and the underwriting group lineup behind the "domestic storage first share" also surfaced. The latest disclosure of the prospectus indicates that Changxin Technology is expected to issue on July 16. In this IPO, CICC and CITIC served as joint sponsors and lead underwriters. Guotai Haitong, Guoyuan Securities, Huatai United, and China Merchants Securities served as joint lead underwriters, and a total of 6 brokers formed an underwriting group. This is a rare "luxury underwriting group". On the one hand, the top investment banks such as CICC, CITIC, Guotai Haitong, Huatai United, and China Merchants Securities appeared intensively, and on the other hand, Anhui local brokerage Guoyuan Securities entered the main underwriting list. More interestingly, a number of main underwriters are also shareholders of Changxin Technology. In addition to investment bank income, equity investment income

stories.title_zh: 36氪首发 | 三个月融三轮，上交大00后博士让具身智能仿生扑翼机器人理解并驾驭流体
stories.title_en: 36氪首发 | 三个月融三轮，上交大00后博士让具身智能仿生扑翼机器人理解并驾驭流体
stories.desc_zh: 图源/企业 本文约2400字，建议阅读6分钟 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 硬氪获悉，具身智能仿生扑翼飞行机器人公司「鹰瞰智翼」已于近期完成数千万元A轮融资。本轮融资是公司在三个月内完成的第三轮融资，由元禾璞华领投，孚腾资本、厚雪资本跟投。资金将主要用于首款消费级产品的量产备货、市场拓展，团队扩充以及下一代具身智能扑翼机器人与流体仿真引擎的研发。 「鹰瞰智翼」2025年3月成立于深圳，是全球较早专注于具身智能扑翼机器人的公司之一。创始人陈昊为上海交通大学机械工程直博生，团队研发人员占比超75%。当前核心成员来自上海交通大学、大疆、华为、字节等高校及科技企业，兼具前沿科研、全球化市场和互联网运营经验，持续推动流体智能技术产业化。 硬氪了解到，扑翼飞行与旋翼无人机的本质差异在于对流体的处理方式。旋翼通过高速旋转与流体对抗，而扑翼则是利用流体飞行。 目前，「鹰瞰智翼」的产品分为两条路线演进。首款消费
stories.desc_en: Source/Enterprise This article is about 2400 words, it is recommended to read 6 minutes Author Ou Xue Editor Yuan Silai Hard Krypton learned that the intelligent bionic flapping wing flying robot company "Eagle Eye Smart Wing" has recently completed tens of millions of yuan in Series A financing. This round of financing is the third round of financing completed by the company within three months, led by Yuanhe Puhua, followed by Futeng Capital and Houxue Capital. The funds will mainly be used for the mass production and stocking of the first consumer-grade product, market expansion, team expansion, and the research and development of the next generation of intelligent flapping wing robots and fluid simulation engines. Founded in Shenzhen in March 2025, EagleWing is one of the first companies in the world to focus on smart flapping wing robots. The founder, Chen Hao, is a mechanical engineering student at Shanghai Jiaotong University, and the team R&D personnel account for more than 75%. At present, the core members are from universities and technology companies such as Shanghai Jiaotong University, Dajiang, Huawei, and Byte. They have both cutting-edge scientific research, global market, and Internet operation experience, and continue to promote the industrialization of fluid intelligence technology. Hard Krypton understands that the essential difference between flapping-wing flying and rotary-wing drones is how the fluid is handled. The rotor counteracts the fluid by rotating at high speed, while the flapping wing uses the fluid to fly. At present, Eagle Wing products evolve in two routes. The first consumer

stories.title_zh: 氪星晚报｜德国大众拟大裁员，最高或裁减12万个岗位；高盛称套利交易当前处境为2000年以来最佳；百亿私募数量达142家，再次刷新历史纪录
stories.title_en: 氪星晚报｜德国大众拟大裁员，最高或裁减12万个岗位；高盛称套利交易当前处境为2000年以来最佳；百亿私募数量达142家，再次刷新历史纪录
stories.desc_zh: 大公司： SK海力士赴美上市，华尔街投行合计佣金有望达1.4亿美元 参与SK海力士上市项目的投行团队将斩获上亿美元丰厚佣金。这家市值突破万亿美元的韩国芯片巨头即将登陆美股，本次发行有望跻身史上规模最大IPO行列。两名熟悉该交易的人士透露，高盛、花旗等承销本次纳斯达克股票发行的投行，总佣金池规模或将突破1.4亿美元；佣金由两部分构成，一是募资总额0.5%的基础承销费，二是SK海力士另行支付的浮动激励奖金。 谷歌要求AI广告必须标注：涵盖搜索和YouTube等 当地时间7月9日，谷歌宣布全面扩大生成式AI广告的披露范围。新规要求在谷歌搜索、YouTube和Discover信息流中，对由AI创建或编辑的商业广告进行明确标注，以防消费者被虚假合成场景误导。 德国大众拟大裁员，最高或裁减12万个岗位 德国大众汽车集团当地时间9日召开监事会会议，就新一轮降本计划进行讨论。记者获悉，方案可能涉及进一步裁
stories.desc_en: Large companies: SK Hynix went public in the United States, and the total commission of the Wall Street investment bank is expected to reach $140 million. The investment bank team participating in the SK Hynix listing project will receive a generous commission of hundreds of millions of dollars. The South Korean chip giant, which has a market capitalization of more than $1 trillion, is about to land in US stocks, and this issuance is expected to rank among the largest IPOs in history. Two people familiar with the transaction revealed that Goldman Sachs, Citi and other investment banks underwriting the Nasdaq stock issuance may exceed $140 million in total commission pool size. The commission consists of two parts, one is the basic underwriting fee of 0.5% of the total fundraising amount, and the other is the floating incentive bonus separately paid by SK Hynix. Google requires AI ads to be annotated: On July 9th, Google announced the full expansion of the disclosure of generative AI ads covering search and YouTube. The new rules require explicit labeling of commercials created or edited by AI in Google Search, YouTube, and Discover feeds in case consumers are misled by fake synthetic scenarios. Volkswagen plans to lay off up to 120,000 positions and hold a meeting of the supervisory board of Volkswagen AG on the 9th local time to discuss a new round of cost reduction plans. The reporter was informed that the program may involve further reductions

stories.title_zh: 徕芬产线将向珠海集中，剃须刀、牙刷拉动新增长丨最前线
stories.title_en: 徕芬产线将向珠海集中，剃须刀、牙刷拉动新增长丨最前线
stories.desc_zh: 徕芬珠海超级工厂（图源/企业） 作者丨欧雪 编辑丨袁斯来 7月8日，徕芬科技在珠海斗门的超级工厂举办媒体探访活动。 这座总投资超5亿元、占地超20万平方米的制造基地，自2025年8月投产以来，首次较大规模地向外界开放参观。 该工厂目前承接电动牙刷、剃须刀及部分新品的生产，并配套了电机车间、精密成型车间、喷涂车间、组装车间及约3000平方米的可靠性实验室。 徕芬可靠性实验室（图源/企业） 自建工厂在消费电子行业并非主流路径，尤其对于一家成立仅7年的公司而言，重资产投入意味着更长的回报周期和更大的经营压力。 硬氪了解到，徕芬选择自建工厂，部分原因在于外部代工厂不愿承接其高成本、高规格的订单——这意味着如果依赖代工，某些设计方案根本无法落地。因此，徕芬坚持核心零部件自研自产。 目前，徕芬已自研并量产高速三相无刷电机、伺服电机、高速直线电机、轴向磁通电机四类技术，覆盖所有产品线。 徕芬珠海超级工厂
stories.desc_en: Leifen Zhuhai Super Factory (Photo Source/Enterprise) Author Ou Xue Editor Yuan Shilai On July 8, Leifen Technology held a media visit at the Zhuhai Doumen Super Factory. This manufacturing base with a total investment of more than 500 million yuan and an area of more than 200,000 square meters has opened to the outside world on a large scale for the first time since it was put into operation in August 2025. The factory is currently engaged in the production of electric toothbrushes, razors and some new products, and is equipped with a motor workshop, a precision molding workshop, a spraying workshop, an assembly workshop and a reliability laboratory of about 3,000 square meters. Leifen Reliability Labs (image source/enterprise) Self-built factories are not the mainstream path in the consumer electronics industry, especially for a company that has only been established for 7 years, heavy asset investment means longer return cycles and greater operating pressure. Hard Krypton learned that Leifen chose to build its own factory in part because of the reluctance of outside foundries to take on its high-cost, high-specification orders - meaning that some designs simply couldn't land if they relied on foundries. Therefore, Leifen insists on self-development and self-production of core components. At present, Leifen has developed and mass-produced four types of technologies for high-speed three-phase brushless motors, servo motors, high-speed linear motors, and axial flux motors, covering all product lines. Leifen Zhuhai Super Factory

stories.title_zh: 赢官司、融新钱，他想把百万「抗癌针」变平价
stories.title_en: 赢官司、融新钱，他想把百万「抗癌针」变平价
stories.desc_zh: 文 | 胡香赟 编辑 | 海若镜 36氪获悉，前传奇生物创始人/首席科学家范晓虎创办的生物科技公司深圳湾岛细胞，近日完成1.4亿人民币A轮融资，本轮融资由松禾资本领投、东方富海跟投。 过去一年，AI像一束强光照亮着资本市场。光芒之外，很多赛道在阴影中被重新定价，创新药板块正是其中之一。潮水褪去，人群对新药好药的需求仍在，创业者们也正在更严苛的估值坐标系里，渡过科学、临床和商业化的一关又一关。 在中国细胞与基因治疗（CGT）领域，“范晓虎”这个名字很难被绕开。2022年3月，他主导的传奇生物细胞药物西达基奥仑赛在欧美上市，是目前全球唯一一款销售额逼近20亿美金的CAR-T细胞疗法。 然而，西达基奥仑赛在美国获批不到一个月，范晓虎出走传奇生物、成立湾岛细胞。传奇生物母公司金斯瑞以“侵害商业秘密”为由对其发起诉讼，称后者在2017年创办传奇生物初期将“6份自己撰写/负责的立项报告等文件发送至个人
stories.desc_en: Wen | Hu Xiangyi Editor | Hairuo Mirror 36 learned that Shenzhen Bay Island Cell, a biotechnology company founded by former legendary biological founder/chief scientist Fan Xiaohu, recently completed a RMB 140 million round of financing, which was led by Songhe Capital and followed by Dongfang Fuhai. Over the past year, AI has illuminated capital markets like a bright beam. Beyond the glow, many circuits are repriced in the shadows, and the innovative medicine sector is one of them. The tide is fading, the demand for new and good drugs is still there, and entrepreneurs are living through scientific, clinical, and commercialization in a more stringent valuation coordinate system. In the field of cell and gene therapy (CGT) in China, the name “Fan Xiaohu” is difficult to bypass. In March 2022, his legendary biological cell drug Cedaciorency was launched in Europe and the United States, and is currently the only CAR-T cell therapy in the world with sales approaching $2 billion. However, less than a month after the approval of the Cedar Chiorenx in the United States, Fan Xiaohu left the legendary creature and established the Bay Island Cell. Legendary Biology parent company Kingsray launched a lawsuit against it on the grounds of "infringing trade secrets", saying that the latter started Legendary Biology in 2017 and sent "6 self-written/responsible project reports and other documents to individuals

stories.title_zh: 36 氪 AI 测评小程序上新！看真实体验与深度测评，多个新功能等你来玩~
stories.title_en: 36 氪 AI 测评小程序上新！看真实体验与深度测评，多个新功能等你来玩~
stories.desc_zh: 先问一个扎心的问题：过去半年，你陆陆续续体验过多少个AI产品，又有多少个真正地被留下来？ 一个新AI产品刷屏，你火速打开官网、注册、验证码、绑定手机，结果试了五分钟——要么排队排到天荒地老，要么生成的东西一言难尽，要么免费额度3秒用完开始催你充值。热闹是它们的，浪费的时间和手机号是你的。 更麻烦的是，你想提前打听打听哪个好用，网上一搜要么全是水评，看不出到底哪好；要么明里暗里恰饭，让人分不清是真心还是广告。 这也是我们做 36 氪 AI 测评的初衷：我们希望搭建一套标准化、客观公正的评测平台，不仅是AI行业的大众点评，还要打造属于 AI 行业的“米其林指南”—— 摒弃流水线打卡文案与软性广告吹捧，只沉淀真实用户亲身试用后，真切实用的原生使用体验。 以下两种渠道均可直达，欢迎体验： 网页端：https://ai.36kr.com/ 小程序端：微信搜索“36氪AI测评”，点击下方卡片或扫码访问
stories.desc_en: 先问一个扎心的问题：过去半年，你陆陆续续体验过多少个AI产品，又有多少个真正地被留下来？ 一个新AI产品刷屏，你火速打开官网、注册、验证码、绑定手机，结果试了五分钟——要么排队排到天荒地老，要么生成的东西一言难尽，要么免费额度3秒用完开始催你充值。热闹是它们的，浪费的时间和手机号是你的。 更麻烦的是，你想提前打听打听哪个好用，网上一搜要么全是水评，看不出到底哪好；要么明里暗里恰饭，让人分不清是真心还是广告。 这也是我们做 36 氪 AI 测评的初衷：我们希望搭建一套标准化、客观公正的评测平台，不仅是AI行业的大众点评，还要打造属于 AI 行业的“米其林指南”—— 摒弃流水线打卡文案与软性广告吹捧，只沉淀真实用户亲身试用后，真切实用的原生使用体验。 以下两种渠道均可直达，欢迎体验： 网页端：https://ai.36kr.com/ 小程序端：微信搜索“36氪AI测评”，点击下方卡片或扫码访问

stories.title_zh: Meta紧急下线争议AI生图功能
stories.title_en: Meta紧急下线争议AI生图功能
stories.desc_zh: 社交媒体巨头Meta本周推出一项允许用户通过@提及公开Instagram账号、利用他人公开内容生成AI图像的新功能。该功能上线时默认允许公开内容被引用，引发美国演员工会等机构对肖像权侵犯以及犯罪风险的强烈担忧。Meta表示，相关功能“未能达到预期效果”，因此决定全面下线。（财联社）
stories.desc_en: Social media giant Meta this week introduced a new feature that allows users to @ mention public Instagram accounts and use other people's public content to generate AI images. By default, public content is allowed to be cited when the feature is launched, raising strong concerns about portrait rights violations and crime risks from organizations such as the American Screen Actors Union. Meta said the feature was “not working as expected” and decided to go fully offline. (Finance Association)

stories.title_zh: 小米回应网传澎程价格
stories.title_en: 小米回应网传澎程价格
stories.desc_zh: 36氪获悉，日前，小米汽车正式公布全新系列“小米澎程”，定位智能可变大空间SUV，计划推出五座版和七座版车型，同时也是小米汽车首个增程式SUV系列。在最新一期答网友问中，小米汽车回应了外界关注的新车发布时间。官方表示，目前小米澎程的发布及上市工作正在有序推进，近期将公布发布时间等最新进展。针对网络流传的新车价格，小米汽车表示，部分价格预测显著低于基本成本常识，大家希望新车拥有“美好价格”的心情可以理解，但价格推测仍需尊重科学和市场规律。
stories.desc_en: 36 Krypton learned that recently, Xiaomi Automobile officially announced a new series of "Xiaomi Pengcheng", positioning intelligent variable space SUV, plans to launch five-seater and seven-seater models, and is also the first extended range SUV series of Xiaomi Automobile. In the latest issue of Answers to Netizens' Questions, Xiaomi Motor responded to the new car release time that was concerned by the outside world. The official said that the release and listing of Xiaomi Pengcheng is currently proceeding in an orderly manner, and the latest progress such as the release time will be announced in the near future. In response to the price of new cars circulating on the Internet, Xiaomi said that some price forecasts are significantly lower than the basic cost common sense. It is understandable that everyone hopes that new cars will have a "good price", but price speculation still needs to respect science and market laws.

stories.title_zh: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.title_en: 年内退出134家，村镇银行改革持续加速
stories.desc_zh: 2026年以来，国内村镇银行重组整合进程持续提速。统计显示，截至7月9日，今年已有134家村镇银行获批退出，机构总量缩减至1048家，延续2025年以来加快出清的态势。业内人士认为，县域金融生态正迎来重塑，精简村镇银行数量，将推动县域金融服务提质增效。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since 2026, the restructuring and integration process of domestic village banks has continued to accelerate. Statistics show that as of July 9, 134 rural banks have been approved to withdraw this year, reducing the total number of institutions to 1,048, continuing the trend of accelerating clearance since 2025. Insiders believe that the county financial ecology is being reshaped and the number of village banks will be streamlined, which will promote the quality and efficiency of county financial services. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: 万勋科技发布“柔韧充”自动充电通用服务引擎，以“0.000s无极容差应变”首创混沌服务、全类通解！
stories.title_en: Wanxun Technology released the "Flexible Charging" automatic charging general service engine, with "0.000s infinite tolerance strain" to create the first chaos service and solve the whole class!
stories.desc_zh: 7月9日，万勋科技于北京举办自动充电机器人业务战略发布会，重磅推出行业首个以 “混沌服务” 模式全面覆盖公用、专用、家用所有应用类别的 “柔韧充” 自动充电通用服务引擎及其核心产品。其独一无二的 “0.000s 无极容差应变” 技术特性，在同期发布的三大类别 “全球首例” 应用成果中得到充分展现，正式为行业带来彻底击穿自动充电各场景规模商用核心困局的通用解法。 0.000S 无机容差应变 瞬息万变的混沌不确定性，为自动充电场景带来 “反应速度” 核心挑战  目前，自动充电演示和概念产品层出不穷，但距真正规模商用始终一步之遥。其核心原因在于，从精准控制的演示环节走向真实而复杂的落地应用时，这不再是一个 “把插头对准插座” 的简单表演，而是一个典型的高不确定性、低可控度的 “现实混沌” 场景作业 —— 室内室外、雨雪风霜、昼夜变换与灯光闪烁等，带来环境的混沌与不确定；成百上千的品牌、
stories.desc_en: On July 9, Wanxun Technology held a strategic conference on automatic charging robot business in Beijing, and launched the industry's first "flexible charging" automatic charging general service engine and its core products with a "chaotic service" model covering all application categories of public, private and home use. Its unique "0.000s infinite tolerance strain" technical characteristics have

stories.title_zh: 2026年度「中国股权投资行业投资机构」系列名册正式发布
stories.title_en: 2026年度「中国股权投资行业投资机构」系列名册正式发布
stories.desc_zh: Alpha will be made, not found。 麦肯锡在2026年初发布的全球私募市场报告中给出了一个精准的判断。Alpha（超额收益）不再是找到的，而是做出来的。持续走低的利率、不断膨胀的估值倍数、唾手可得的廉价融资，这些放大利润的旧杠杆们，在过去十年间逐一消失。以至于，全球封闭式PE募资在2025年同比下滑17%，亚太地区的跌幅接近一半。 中国市场的故事更加复杂。钱的源头变了，美元基金退潮之后，国资和产业资本接过了定价权，也接过了游戏规则的书写权。退出的通道也变了，PPT里的“多元化退出策略”，变成了真实发生的交易（至少是一部分GP不得不学会的新手艺）。 与此同时，主线变了。一级市场关于人工智能的叙事，已悄然完成了一次逻辑的更替。 2025年，仅具身智能一个方向就吸纳了超过656亿元融资，涌入了近千家公司。更长期看，硬科技在VC投资中的占比五年内从38%攀升至62%。毫无
stories.desc_en: Alpha will be made, not found. McKinsey gave a precise judgment in its Global Private Markets report released in early 2026. Alpha is no longer found, it is made. Consistently low interest rates, ballooning valuation multiples, and easy access to cheap financing, the old levers that amplified profits have disappeared one by one over the past decade. As a result, global closed-end PE fundraising de

stories.title_zh: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.title_en: Meta removes controversial AI feature on Instagram after backlash
stories.desc_zh: 该公司在一篇博客文章中表示： “我们的目的是提供一个有用的创意工具，并让人们控制他们的公共内容是否可以以这种方式被引用。” “我们听到有人反馈说这个功能没有达到目标，所以它不再可用。”
stories.desc_en: "Our intent was to provide a useful creative tool and to give people control over whether their public content could be referenced in this way," the company said in a blog post. "We've heard the feedback that this feature missed the mark, so it's no longer available."

stories.title_zh: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft
stories.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft

stories.desc_en: Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

stories.title_zh: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.title_en: Open source AI matters more than ever, according to Hugging Face’s Clem Delangue
stories.desc_zh: Hugging Face首席执行官Clem Delangue表示，开源人工智能正在蓬勃发展。近年来，该公司已经发展成为类似于人工智能的GitHub ，人工智能开发人员可以共享和下载开放模型和数据集，现在大约有一半的财富500强企业都在使用这些模型和数据集。Delangue已经看到同样的故事一次又一次地发生：公司开始[…]
stories.desc_en: Open source AI is booming, according to Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue. The company has grown into something like a GitHub for AI in recent years, where AI builders can share and download open models and datasets, now used by roughly half the Fortune 500. Delangue has seen the same story play out again and again: companies start […]

stories.title_zh: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.title_en: SK Hynix raises $26.5B in the biggest foreign IPO in US history, is urged to build new US fabs
stories.desc_zh: 人工智能芯片热潮刚刚创造了华尔街迄今为止最大的时刻。现在， SK海力士和三星被要求在美国建造工厂。
stories.desc_en: The AI chip boom just produced its biggest Wall Street moment yet. Now SK Hynix and Samsung are being asked to build U.S. factories.

stories.desc_en: Allure editors put pro-MUAs' best tips to the test.

stories.title_zh: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.title_en: 市场发行热度大幅升温，熊猫债存量规模首超5000亿元
stories.desc_zh: 今年以来，熊猫债发行热度显著上升。Wind数据显示，截至7月9日，以缴款截止日为统计口径，年内熊猫债发行规模已突破1700亿元，同比增长超七成；市场存量规模首次迈上5000亿元。与此同时，熊猫债发行主体结构持续优化，境外主权机构、跨国龙头企业、多边开发机构纷纷入场，为市场发展注入新动能。受访业内人士表示，熊猫债市场发行火热，主要受益于中美利差倒挂、人民币融资成本优势突出、人民币汇率趋稳等因素。熊猫债市场规模稳步扩张，将有助于推动人民币从贸易结算货币向国际投融资货币转型，持续提升人民币在全球资本市场的话语权，也是我国推进金融高水平对外开放的成果。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Since the beginning of this year, the heat of issuing panda bonds has increased significantly. Wind data shows that as of July 9, with the payment deadline as the statistical caliber, the issuance scale of panda bonds has exceeded 170 billion yuan in the year, an increase of more than 70% year-on-year; the market stock has reached 500 billion yuan for the first time. At the same time, the structure of the issuing entity of panda bonds continued to be optimized, and overseas sovereign institutions, multinational leading enterprises, and multilateral development institutions have entered the market to inject new momentum into market development. According to the interviewed industry insiders, the hot issue in the panda bond market was mainly due to factors such as the inverted spread between China and the United States, the prominent advantage of RMB financing costs, and the stabilization of the RMB exchange rate. The steady expansion of the size of the panda bond market will help promote the transformation of the RMB from a trade settlement currency to an international investment and financing currency, and continue to enhance the RMB's voice in the global capital market. It is also the result of China's promotion of high-level financial opening up. (Securities Times)

stories.title_zh: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.title_en: SK海力士考虑“内存即服务”模式，或允许客户租赁而非购买芯片
stories.desc_zh: SK海力士正在考虑以新的方式销售其内存芯片的使用权，包括所谓的“内存即服务”，这意味着客户可以向这家韩国公司租用存储资源，而无需购买芯片。“我们实际上可以提供其他商业模式，”SK集团会长崔泰源在接受彭博电视采访时表示。“我们可以成为存储服务提供商，提供‘内存即服务’。未来，这实际上是我们可以关注的另一个领域。”（财联社）
stories.desc_en: SK Hynix is considering new ways to sell the use of its memory chips, including so-called “memory-as-a-service,” which means customers can lease storage resources from the South Korean company without having to buy the chips. “We can actually offer other business models,” Cui Taiyuan, chairman of SK Group, said in an interview with Bloomberg Television. “We can be a storage service provider, offering ‘memory as a service’. In the future, this is actually another area that we can focus on." (Finance Association)

stories.title_zh: 马斯克据悉要求特斯拉员工转向使用Grok
stories.title_en: 马斯克据悉要求特斯拉员工转向使用Grok
stories.desc_zh: 据报道，马斯克在一份备忘录中告知特斯拉员工，鉴于Grok 4.5的Token成本低于竞争对手，员工们应“尽可能”切换到Grok。他还要求工程师直接通过电子邮件向他反馈有关该模型的信息。（界面）
stories.desc_en: Musk reportedly told Tesla employees in a memo that employees should switch to Grok “as much as possible” given that Grok 4.5's token costs less than competitors. He also asked the engineer to feed back information about the model directly to him via email. (Interface)

stories.title_zh: OpenAI安全系统负责人据悉将离职
stories.title_en: OpenAI安全系统负责人据悉将离职
stories.desc_zh: 据报道，在OpenAI重组之际，该公司安全系统负责人Johannes Heidecke本周告知员工其将离职。此次重组旨在整合OpenAI的安全团队和研究团队。备忘录显示，OpenAI首席研究官Mark Chen表示，安全团队将向公司研究副总裁兼整合负责人Mia Glaese汇报工作，后者将兼任研究与安全副总裁。此前领导 OpenAI安全团队的Saachi Jain将成为公司临时安全系统负责人，向Glaese汇报工作。（界面）
stories.desc_en: Johannes Heidecke, the company's head of security systems, reportedly informed employees this week of his departure amid the restructuring of OpenAI. The reorganization aims to integrate OpenAI's security and research teams. Mark Chen, OpenAI's chief research officer, said the security team will report to Mia Glaese, the company's vice president of research and head of integration, who will also serve as vice president of research and security, according to the memo. Saachi Jain, who previously led the OpenAI security team, will become the head of the company's temporary security system, reporting to Glaese. (Interface)

stories.title_zh: 六氟磷酸锂需求旺盛，行业盈利能力显著提升
stories.title_en: 六氟磷酸锂需求旺盛，行业盈利能力显著提升
stories.desc_zh: 需求拉动下，2026年国内六氟磷酸锂市场结束前期生产亏损状态，价格一度冲破16万元/吨。虽然上半年市场价格总体呈现冲高回落状态，但行业企业盈利水平已显著提升。近日，天赐材料、多氟多等多家上市公司业绩预喜。对于六氟磷酸锂未来的市场供需格局，当前市场给予看多预期。（证券时报）
stories.desc_en: Driven by demand, the domestic lithium hexafluorophosphate market ended in 2026 with a production loss, and the price once exceeded 160,000 yuan/ton. Although market prices generally showed a downward trend in the first half of the year, the profitability of industry companies has increased significantly. Recently, a number of listed companies such as Tianci Materials and Dorfuoduo have previewed their performance. For the future market supply and demand pattern of lithium hexafluorophosphate, the current market is expected to be bullish. (Securities Times)

Omnia, which operates nationally as a cooperative purchasing organization, has expanded Opus to include more than 8 million SKUs, according to the company. The new suppliers include IT solutions provider SHI, […] The post Omnia P

stories.title_zh: Home Depot expands delivery for overseas military families
stories.title_en: Home Depot expands delivery for overseas military families
stories.desc_zh: 家得宝表示，它正在扩大其交付合作伙伴关系，以覆盖海外军事社区。家得宝表示，截至7月8日，其与军事交易所的合作伙伴关系已扩大到包括向陆军邮局（ APO ）、舰队邮局（ FPO ）和外交邮局（ DPO ）地址发货。在这样做的过程中，零售商及其合作伙伴将提供[…]家得宝后扩展DELIV
stories.desc_en: The Home Depot said it’s expanding its delivery partnership to reach overseas military communities. As of July 8, its partnership with military exchanges expanded to include delivery to Army Post Office (APO), Fleet Post Office (FPO) and Diplomatic Post Office (DPO) addresses, Home Depot said. In doing so, the retailer and its partners will provide […] The post Home Depot expands deliv

stories.title_zh: Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DTC strategy boosts Q2 growth
stories.title_en: Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DTC strategy boosts Q2 growth
stories.desc_zh: 由于Levi Strauss & Co.继续投资其直接面向消费者(DTC)业务，其第二财季的电子商务收入和整体销售额有所增长。截至5月31日的季度， Levi Strauss报告净收入为15.6亿美元，同比增长8.0%。在线收入是Levi Strauss的DTC渠道的一部分， […] Levi Strauss后的电子商务销售额作为DT增长了19 ％
stories.desc_en: Levi Strauss & Co. grew ecommerce revenue and overall sales in its fiscal second quarter, as the retailer continued to invest in its direct-to-consumer (DTC) business. For the quarter ended May 31, Levi Strauss reported net revenue of $1.56 billion, up 8.0% year over year. Online revenue, which is part of Levi Strauss’ DTC channel, […] The post Levi Strauss ecommerce sales jump 19% as DT
